## 🤔 Configuration Question

Help us understand your data:

- **Data format**: [e.g. JSON, CSV, Parquet]
- **Data volume**: [e.g. 1K records/day, 1M events/hour]
- **Data frequency**: [e.g. Real-time, Hourly batches, Daily]
